query:
-- جدول الفواتير الإلكترونية
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS invoices (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  invoice_number VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  contract_id INT,
  tenant_id INT,
  property_id INT,
  amount DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL,
  vat_amount DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  total_amount DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL,
  issue_date BIGINT NOT NULL,
  due_date BIGINT NOT NULL,
  paid_date BIGINT,
  status ENUM('draft','issued','paid','cancelled','overdue') DEFAULT 'draft',
  description TEXT,
  qr_code TEXT,
  zatca_uuid VARCHAR(100),
  zatca_hash VARCHAR(200),
  notes TEXT,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);

-- جدول الحجوزات المسبقة
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS unit_reservations (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  unit_id INT NOT NULL,
  property_id INT NOT NULL,
  applicant_name VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  applicant_phone VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  applicant_email VARCHAR(200),
  applicant_id_number VARCHAR(50),
  desired_start_date BIGINT NOT NULL,
  desired_duration_months INT DEFAULT 12,
  deposit_amount DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  deposit_paid BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  deposit_paid_date BIGINT,
  status ENUM('pending','confirmed','cancelled','converted') DEFAULT 'pending',
  notes TEXT,
  handled_by INT,
  confirmed_at BIGINT,
  cancelled_at BIGINT,
  cancellation_reason TEXT,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);

-- جدول إعدادات إشعارات البريد الإلكتروني
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS email_notification_settings (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  notify_contract_expiry BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  notify_payment_reminder BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  notify_payment_received BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  notify_maintenance_update BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  notify_new_reservation BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  expiry_days_before INT DEFAULT 30,
  payment_reminder_days_before INT DEFAULT 7,
  email_address VARCHAR(200),
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);

-- جدول سجل إشعارات البريد الإلكتروني
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS email_notification_log (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  recipient_email VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  subject VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  body TEXT,
  notification_type VARCHAR(100),
  reference_id INT,
  status ENUM('sent','failed','pending') DEFAULT 'pending',
  sent_at BIGINT,
  error_message TEXT,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);
